message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "executor:AnalysisExecutor" as Executor
participant "Analysis" as Analysis
participant "CountryCaseAPIGetter" as CountryCaseAPIGetter
participant "CountryDeathAPIGetter" as CountryDeathAPIGetter
participant "CountryPopulationAPIGetter" as CountryPopulationAPIGetter
participant "APIInformationGetter" as APIInformationGetter
participant "Covid API" as CovidAPI

participant "User" as UserActor
participant "executor:AnalysisExecutor" as ExecutorActor
participant "Analysis" as AnalysisActor
participant "CountryCaseAPIGetter" as CountryCaseAPIGetterActor
participant "CountryDeathAPIGetter" as CountryDeathAPIGetterActor
participant "CountryPopulationAPIGetter" as CountryPopulationAPIGetterActor
participant "APIInformationGetter" as APIInformationGetterActor
participant "Covid API" as CovidAPIActor

UserActor ..> ExecutorActor : runAnalysis()
UserActor ..> AnalysisActor : analyze()
UserActor ..> CovidAPIActor : Covid API

alt [At least one country selected for analysis]
    par
        par
            getCases()
                getDataURL()
                API Endpoint URL
                API Call
                API Information
            Cases in target Countries
            par
                getPopulation()
                    getDataURL()
                    API Endpoint URL
                    API Call
                    API Information
                Population of target Countries
            end
        end
    end
    par
        [TotalCaseAnalysis]
            getCases()
                getDataURL()
                API Endpoint URL
                API Call
                API Information
            Cases in target Countries
        end
    end
    par
        [Majority: CaseSexPerCapitaAnalysis]
            par
                getMaleCases()
                    getDataURL()
                    API Endpoint URL
                    API Call
                    API Information
                Male cases in target Countries
                getFemaleCases()
                    A call to the endpoint has already been made so another is not necessary
                Female cases in target Countries
                par
                    getMalePopulation()
                        getDataURL()
                        API Endpoint URL
                        API Call
                        API Information
                    Male population in target Countries
                    getFemalePopulation()
                        A call to the endpoint has already been made so another is not necessary
                    Female population in target Countries
                end
            end
        end
    end
    par
        [DeathsPerCapitaAnalysis]
            par
                getDeaths()
                    getDataURL()
                    API Endpoint URL
                    API Call
                    API Information
                Deaths in target Countries
                par
                    getPopulation()

                        API Call
                        API Information
                    Population of target Countries
                end
            end
        end
    end
    par
